backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to fix all non-functional buttons across the site, listing the affected component files and related build components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in a QueryClientProvider and renders all page sections in order: WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, brand sections, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AssuredToursSect: Scroll-animated section for the Assured Tours & Travels subsidiary, displaying a banner, image pair, six service cards, and a CTA button that smoothly scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/ComingSoonSectio: Section showcasing three upcoming Luminia brands (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) as animated cards with images, descriptions, and a 'Notify Me' button per brand.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Premium dark footer displaying the Luminia logo, a portfolio brand list, and working contact links for email and WhatsApp with hover effects and a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/GSTServicesSecti: Renders the GST Services section with animated header, banner image, and three service cards (Registration, Filing, Consulting) that scroll to the contact section on click.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for Luminia Group with a background image, animated title/subtitle, a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the subsidiaries section, and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaCapturesS: Renders the Luminia Captures photography division section with an animated header, banner image, two showcase images, and six service cards linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaTechLabsS: Renders the Luminia TechLabs division section with an animated header, banner image, a two-column content layout with a dev image, and six technology service offerings.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Displays a centered manifesto quote section with decorative gold dividers, an animated blockquote attributed to Luminia Group, and a stats row showing subsidiaries, ambition, and vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to page sections, a logo button that scrolls to top, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with scroll-based background opacity change.
A full-screen 'Coming Soon' placeholder page for Luminia Group featuring a fade-in animation, gold decorative dividers, and a footer attribution link.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal overlay component that displays detailed information and an image carousel for a selected Luminia subsidiary, supporting keyboard navigation and closing on Escape or backdrop click.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Displays a grid of Luminia subsidiary cards with icons, names, and taglines; clicking a card opens the SubsidiaryDetails modal for that subsidiary.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash screen shown once per session with animated gold particles, a shimmer headline, and an 'Enter' button that fades out and sets a sessionStorage flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no implementation, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static site.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and an isVisible boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the gold/obsidian luxury theme, Tailwind imports, base resets, scrollbar/selection styles, and keyframe animations used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom gold/obsidian/ivory color palettes, Cormorant Garamond fonts, zero border-radius defaults, luxury box shadows, and custom keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, known issues, and a single feature request to fix all non-functional buttons across the site except the already-working Connect with Us section links.
